overall.description: Exploration of a medieval castle corridor overlooking a cozy Gryffindor common room decorated for winter, featuring stone architecture, red and gold banners, floating candles, and a translucent ghostly figure. High-quality game engine footage with warm firelight and natural window lighting.

events.description: translucent ghostly figure with ruff collar appears near the balcony railing
camera turns right to face the common room overlook

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the stone corridor, examining the portraits and tapestries on the walls

notable_agents.action: ghostly figure hovering near the balcony railing, looking out over the common room

entered.detail: large red and gold banner with lion crest hanging from stone wall
grey stone block wall with aged texture and vertical columns
stone balustrade overlooking the common room below
brown tufted leather sofa against the corridor wall
framed portraits in oval and rectangular frames hanging on the stone wall
dark wooden dresser with small decorative items on top

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a narrow stone corridor adorned with red Gryffindor banners and framed portraits. A translucent ghost appears near the balcony railing overlooking the common room below. The space features warm mixed lighting and medieval stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with fireplace and seating areas

events.description: view opens from narrow corridor to reveal the full two-story common room from balcony level
camera pans right across the room showing the Christmas tree and students sitting by the fire

agents.ego_description: standing at the balcony railing, looking down and panning across the busy common room

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes sitting on sofas and conversing near the fireplace

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and mantelpiece decorations
decorated Christmas tree with ornaments and lights near the center of the room
iron chandeliers with multiple candle lights hanging from wooden ceiling beams
large round wooden door with metal studs set into a stone frame
red and gold patterned wall hangings covering the stone walls
cluster of brown leather sofas and armchairs arranged around rugs

segments.scene_description: From the balcony overlook, the camera pans across a spacious medieval common room filled with students sitting on leather furniture around a burning fireplace. A decorated Christmas tree stands near the center while chandeliers hang from exposed wooden beams. Red and gold tapestries adorn the stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor leading to wooden exit door

events.description: ghostly figure moves close to the camera, filling the frame with translucent form
camera turns left toward the wooden exit door with glass panels

agents.ego_description: walking back through the corridor toward the exit, passing close by the ghostly figure

notable_agents.action: ghostly figure with ruff collar floating in the corridor, turning to face the camera

entered.detail: dark wooden door with rectangular glass panels showing light from outside
brass standing lamp with fringed shade next to the sofa

segments.scene_description: The camera moves back through the stone corridor, passing close to the ghostly figure which hovers near the wall. The view returns to the corridor's portraits and leather sofa before turning toward a wooden exit door with glass panels at the end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that glides from a secluded stone corridor into a bustling, festive common room before retreating back through the hallway. It begins by moving along a narrow passage adorned with red banners and framed portraits, passing a translucent ghost hovering near a balcony railing. As the camera reaches the overlook, the view expands to reveal a spacious medieval room where students gather around a burning fireplace beneath exposed wooden beams and a decorated Christmas tree. The scene then shifts as the camera pulls back into the corridor, drifting past the ghostly figure and leather furniture. Finally, the movement continues along the stone walls, turning toward a wooden exit door with glass panels at the end of the hall.
